title: Funding Document Prep Checklist
meta_description: Prepare the common documents and business details that help a funding readiness review move faster and avoid wasted applications.

hero.eyebrow: Prep the file before the pitch
hero.headline: Clean documents beat confident chaos.
hero.body: The right documents do not guarantee funding, but they make the review conversation cleaner, faster, and less painful.

checklist_groups.heading: Credit and obligation context
items: Recent missed payment context if relevant
Known tax lien or bankruptcy context if relevant

checklist_groups.heading: Use-case documents
items: Marketing or growth plan when relevant

guardrails: Do not expose providers, affiliate links, apply links, commissions, private contacts, routing logic, underwriting notes, credentials, or real borrower PII.
Do not imply approval, final eligibility, best rates, or instant funding.
Link CTAs to public-safe internal routes only.
